articles.title: Bruins ‘comfortable’ taking a leap of faith on two goalie prospects in 2026 NHL Draft
articles.description:
"We felt we needed to get back out in front of having depth in that position."

The post Bruins ‘comfortable’ taking a leap of faith on two goalie prospects in 2026 NHL Draft appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins prioritize goalie depth by selecting two prospects in the 2026 NHL Draft.
Goalie prospects aim to strengthen the team's future, enhancing local fan engagement.
Increased focus on goalie development could improve Boston's competitive edge in upcoming seasons.

articles.title: Former Bruin Milan Lucic hired by Buffalo as a pro scout
articles.description:
The 38-year-old spent his first eight seasons with Boston, where Lucic won a Stanley Cup in 2011.

The post Former Bruin Milan Lucic hired by Buffalo as a pro scout appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Milan Lucic, 38, joins Buffalo as a pro scout after Bruins tenure.
Lucic played eight seasons in Boston, winning the Stanley Cup in 2011.
His scouting role may influence future player acquisitions affecting Boston's rivals.

articles.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, rejecting Trump’s proposed limits
articles.description:
By a 6-3 vote, the court struck down Trump’s order.

The post Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, rejecting Trump’s proposed limits appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Supreme Court upheld birthright citizenship by a 6-3 vote on June 30, 2026.
Court rejected Trump's proposed limits, ensuring citizenship for children born in the U.S.
Boston residents maintain access to citizenship rights for newborns, impacting local immigrant families.
